title: os.hardening.sshd Facet
description: Effective sshd configuration relevant to CIS SSH hardening (CIS Linux §5.2), read from `sshd -T` so the projected value is what the daemon actually enforces. Projected by the os-hardening collector gather Run (charter §1.2); demanded by the shipping cis-5.2.x facet-observation Baselines (§1.1). Values are the normalized `sshd -T` string tokens.
